title: D.Perlla Knife Set, 6 PCS Kitchen Knife Set with Detachable Round Upright Knife Cylinder, Knives Set with Marble Pattern Handles Design, Modern & Stylish, for Easy Cleaning and Drying
features: 【High Quality Stainless Steel Blade】 Stainless steel knife set is sturdy and rust-resistant. With careful hand-polishing and precise tempering technology, each blade edge is 15-17 °per side for long-lasting sharpness and makes cutting through food easy.

【Easy to Grip & Ergonomic Handle】With striped marble texture knife handle, the knife block gives kitchen a neat, nice, clean, and organized look.And handle perfectly fits any hand shape, designed by the most professional designers. Optimized weight and good balance make this kitchen block knife set fit nicely in the palm of hand and you feel comfortable especially during high-frequency use.

【Double-layer Wave Slots for Cleaning】The detachable top slot is convenient to clean the inside of the upright knife block.The parallel wave slots prevent friction and damage between knives, making the knife body stand upright without shaking.The knife edge won't touch the block as traditional blocks did and damage the knife edge and block.
【6 Pcs Kitchen Knife Set】 The white knife set with block include: 8" Chef Knife, 8" Bread Knife, 8" Carving Knife, 5" Utility Knife, 3.5" Paring Knife and PP Resin Round Knife Holder.

【Best Customer Service】To protect the sharpness and glossiness of the knives sets, we recommend hand wash.We’re dedicated to enhance your cooking experience. If you have any problem about it, please feel free to contact us.
